title: Cabinet paper – Update on Census Transformation and timing and nature of the next census | Stats NZ
content:
## Cabinet paper – Update on Census Transformation and timing and nature of the next census
21 November 2019, 12:00pm
This paper provides updates on the progress of the Census Transformation programme, which has a long-term goal to develop a new census model based on administrative data. The paper also confirms the timing and nature of the next census.
- Minute of decision on Update on Census Transformation and timing and nature of the next census Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 137 KB
